rows.label: qev050907_MSG0001
rows.name: Guh... As expected... I was no match...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0002
rows.name:
My body feels as though it might burn
to ash with frustration, ...and yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0003
rows.name:
It is strange. At the same time, I
feel a sense of refreshing clarity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0004
rows.name:
I wonder if this feeling... is
proof that I am still too soft...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_JNK0010
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev050907_SEL0011
rows.name: Praise her combat skills in a Doll.

rows.label: qev050907_JNK0020
rows.name: Silence

rows.label: qev050907_SEL0021
rows.name: Say nothing.

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0005
rows.name: My combat skills in a Doll...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0006
rows.name:
It is true that I myself felt more attuned
to it than fighting in person, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0007
rows.name:
I see... It seems I was able to
push you at least a little bit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0008
rows.name:
............I am in your debt.
It is pathetic, but your words
have saved me somewhat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0009
rows.name:
No, that way of putting it
is still too negative.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0010
rows.name:
Thanks to you... I have
gained confidence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0011
rows.name: Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0012
rows.name:
Yes... Remaining silent is a
kindness unique to an ally.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0013
rows.name:
In the past, I would have
certainly felt insulted by
being shown such pity, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0014
rows.name:
Having you do it... somehow
doesn't feel like a bad thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0015
rows.name:
I have kept you tied up with someone like
me for far too long. ...I apologize.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0016
rows.name:
But thanks to meeting you, I feel as though
I have found my own path once more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0017
rows.name:
It is an extremely uncertain path,
where I cannot see far ahead, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0018
rows.name:
Right now, I have just a little bit of
confidence to push forward on that path.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0019
rows.name:
And that is... something you
gave to me, and no one else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0020
rows.name: I am grateful for our meeting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0021
rows.name:
It may take time, but I swear to
you that I will absolutely become
a splendid Larsian warrior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0022
rows.name:
And when that day comes,
we shall meet again...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0023
rows.name: Let us part here with that promise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050907_MSG0024
rows.name: ...Stay well.[ST:wait ]
